## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize content review and align on the long-tail SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Review Streamlined:** Five articles are ready for Maggie's review, pre-checked for links and updated with the clinical framework to reduce her workload.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [**Long-Tail Strategy Approved:** A new content strategy will target informational topics (e.g., "What is perimenopause?") without mentioning Biologica's products, isolating it from DSHEA regulatory risk.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**LLM Risk Managed:** The strategy leverages LLMs by structuring content with FAQs and clear headings, but Biologica is not liable for the LLM's synthesized answers.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [**Next Steps Defined:** GrowthX will deliver a filtered topic list, Brian will coordinate with developers on site structure, and blog images will be updated by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Process

  - [Five articles are ready for Maggie's review, updated to streamline the process.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
      - [**Updates:** Clinical framework, MD tags, and link checking.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)
      - [**Goal:** Reduce Maggie's review time by ensuring links are correct.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Brian will send the list to Maggie for a spot-check to validate the new process.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)

### Long-Tail SEO Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Drive traffic by answering common user questions via traditional SEO and LLMs (e.g., ChatGPT, Perplexity).](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [**LLM Content Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)
      - [**Proximity:** Place questions and answers within 500–800 words of each other.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Format:** Use FAQs and TLDRs for easy LLM parsing.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=383.0)
      - [**Outcome:** LLMs synthesize answers from Biologica's content and provide a source link, driving traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=419.0)

### Regulatory Risk Mitigation

  - [**Challenge:** Ensure all on-site content is DSHEA compliant.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)
      - [**Rule:** Content must focus on structure/function claims, not disease claims.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
      - [**Exception:** Disease topics are allowed with a medical disclaimer stating the supplement is not intended to diagnose, treat, or cure.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Solution:** Create a separate content category for purely informational topics.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Content:** Focus on general health information (e.g., "What is perimenopause?").](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
      - [**Product Mention:** No direct mention of Biologica's products or their use for specific conditions.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This structure isolates the content from DSHEA risk, requiring only medical accuracy review, not regulatory review.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1066.0)

### Implementation & Logistics

  - [**Topic Filtering:** GrowthX will filter the initial topic list to remove any that could imply product claims (e.g., "perimenopause supplements").](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
  - [**Site Structure:** Brian will work with developers to decide where the new content will live.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [**Option 1:** Integrate into the main blog as a new category.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
      - [**Option 2:** Create a separate content hub (e.g., `/blog/info/`).](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [**Blog Images:** Images will be updated by Friday to remove overlay text and use tighter crops.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
      - [Deliver a filtered long-tail topic list in a new Airtable tab.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1183.0)
      - [Create prototype content for review.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
      - [Confirm blog image updates are completed by Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Brian:**](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Send the five updated articles to Maggie for spot-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Coordinate with developers on the site structure for the new content.](https://fathom.video/share/DVzKD4XedLmc1Gyix4P3vupzF5ioM5Ls?tab=summary&timestamp=1366.0)
